title: peucedanum officinale subsp. longifolium
intro: Peucedanum officinale subsp. longifolium, also known as the Long-leaved or Carrot Fern, is a subspecies of the Peucedanum officinale plant, a member of the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Peucedanum officinale subsp. longifolium include its potential to treat coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive disorders and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
